manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: square, bermuda, amazon, cycle, snowman, tower, dragon, robot, platypus.
Your opponent's team words are: swing, dwarf, air, boom, doctor, file, disease, dress.
Distractor words are: hand, engine, apple, fork, thief, pie, embassy.
The kill words are: shark.

message.content:
CLUE: shape
TARGETS: square, cycle, tower
message.reasoning:
We need to give a clue word and list which of our team's words are related. Must be single-word clue not any of the words listed. Must not contain parts of them. Provide CLUE: WORD, TARGETS: list.

We need to think of a clue that ties multiple of our words. Our words: square, bermuda, amazon, cycle, snowman, tower... dragon, robot, platypus. Look for something common: maybe "myth" links dragon, robot? Not. "Construction" could link tower, square (as in plaza), robot? Not.

"Winter" links snowman only. "Eco" could link amazon (rainforest), bermuda (triangle?), cycle (recycling), robot (eco-friendly?), not.

Maybe "metal" links robot, tower (steel), cycle (bike), but also dragon (metal?), not.

Maybe "mythical" links dragon, platypus? Not.

Bermuda is triangle. Square is shape. Cycle is shape? Could clue "shape"? That would relate to square, cycle (circle maybe), tower not shape, robot not. But shape is not part of words.

Better: "geometry" links square, cycle (circle), tower (maybe?), not.

Could clue "rainforest" links amazon, maybe bermuda? not.

Could clue "electric" links robot, tower (transmission tower), cycle (electric bike), dragon (electric dragon? not). Not great.

Could clue "legend" links dragon, maybe amazon (Amazon the warrior women), not.

Maybe clue "paper" link "square" (paper square), "amazon" (Amazon sells books), "tower" (paper tower), no.

We need be careful about kill word "shark". Can't clue that.

Distractors also exist; we must avoid clue that could be associated with distractors maybe. But it's okay if partner guesses distractor they'd end turn.

Better to aim for 2-3 words.

Maybe "mythic" for dragon, platypus (actually platypus is a real animal but unique). Not strong.

"Bermuda" is triangle; "triangle" could also be shape (square is a shape). So clue "shape" could link square, cycle (circle), maybe tower (a shape). Also maybe robot (shape). Might be ambiguous.

But we must list which target words we think relate. If we clue "shape", we could list square, cycle, tower (as shapes). That's three.

Check that "shape" not in any list. Not a word in lists. Good.

But could "shape" also relate to distractors like hand (hand shape), engine shape, etc. Might cause confusion but okay.

We must ensure clue not contain parts of target words. "shape" contains "shap" not part of any. Good.

Thus answer:

CLUE: shape
TARGETS: square, cycle, tower

Make sure format correct.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide a comma-separated list of up to 3 words from the following list that best relate or are most closely associated with the word 'shape'. Always start your list of guess(es) with 'GUESS: ' and do not include any other text in your answer.

embassy, snowman, disease, shark, thief, air, boom, hand, fork, doctor, file, tower, dwarf, square, bermuda, engine, dress, amazon, apple, platypus, cycle, pie, dragon, swing, robot

message.reasoning:

Also "cycle" maybe shape (circle). But "cycle" not shape itself. "dragon" no. "snowman" has shape. "shark" shape. The best is "square". Then maybe "fork"? Not really shape. "hand" shape? "engine"? Could be "shape" as in "form". "file" maybe shape a file? Not.

Probably choose "square", "snowman", "shark"? Those are objects with distinctive shapes. However they ask "best relate or most closely associated". Square is definitely a shape. Snowman is also a shape built. Shark shape as animal. Could pick "square, snowman, shark". Up to 3 words. Provide comma-separated list.

Thus answer: GUESS: square, snowman,
